content.en:
"So xenophobic!"

Ye Tian finally knew why the other Nine Realm-level controllers didn't try to come here to try, not because they didn't want to, but because the Ten Realm-level controllers here didn't allow it.

If you don't have a Ten Realm-level master as a backer, once you come here, you will be expelled by them.

Rumble!!!

The aura of the Ten Realm-level controllers crushed over one after another, making Ye Tian extremely dignified.

Even if he tried his best, he couldn't compete with a Ten Realm-level master, the gap was too big!

Just as Ye Tian was about to retreat, a cold and frosty voice came.

"My junior brother is here, why can't he?"

As soon as the words fell, a bright figure tore through the void and descended on the Primal Spirit Mountain.

"Snow Maiden Controller!"

Many Ten Realm-level controllers looked moved, although this was only a newly promoted Ten Realm-level controller, his combat power was not necessarily much worse than them.

The eighteen Ten Realm-level Masters here had only broken through the Ten-Realm-level Masters of the seventh layer of the Primal Tower, and the Ten-Realm-level Masters who had broken through the eighth and ninth layers, and they couldn't look down on the Primordial Spiritual Spring Liquid.

Therefore, their strength is not much higher than that of the Snow Maiden Controller.

"The junior brother of the Snow Maiden controller is naturally qualified to come here!"

The Ten Realm-level Masters who threatened Ye Tian said.

Obviously, they won't expel Ye Tian anymore.

As long as there are Ten Realm-level controllers here, the other Ten Realm-level controllers will not be expelled, otherwise even if they are the personal disciples of the Ten Elements Ancestor, there is no one to protect them, and they should be expelled or expelled.

Strength is everything, identity and status are secondary!

......

"Thank you, Fourth Senior Sister!"

Ye Tian thanked.

"It's just a small matter, but if you snatch the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid, I can only guarantee that the Ten Realm-level Masters will not deal with you, but the other Nine Realm-level Masters and whether you can snatch the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid or not is up to you!" the Snow Maiden Controller reminded.

"I know!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Soon.

Many of the Eternal Masters became serious, and the aura on their bodies began to surge, as the Primordial Spiritual Spring Liquid was about to appear.

Bang!!!

A river sprung up and surrounded the Primordial Spirit Mountain.

This is the prelude to the appearance of the primordial spiritual spring liquid!

Suddenly.

Drops of golden light emerged, and those grains of golden light were actually drops of primordial spiritual spring liquid.

As for where the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid came from, many Eternal Masters also knew that it was inside the Primal Spiritual Mountain, but they couldn't enter there unless it was an existence like the Ten Elements Ancestor who made a move.

However, the Primal Ancestors were not dead, and the Ten Elements Ancestors naturally would not deliberately offend the Primordial Ancestors.

"Mine!"

A Ten Realm-level Masters made a move.

For the Nine Realm-level Masters, these Primal Spiritual Spring Liquids were too scattered, so they had a chance, otherwise these Primal Spiritual Spring Liquids would be Ten Realm-level Masters!

Ye Tian naturally made the first move.

Although his strength is not strong, he has five statues of ten thousand phases and a blade of will, and his combat power is naturally not bad, which is comparable to the Nine Realms level controller who has broken through the sixth layer of the Taichu Tower.

What's even more terrifying is that his physique is special, he has the constitution of the Devouring Mountain, and he can weaken some of other people's attacks.

Therefore, he was not afraid of the attacks of other Nine Realm-level masters at all.

Ye Tian's goal was very clear, that was to snatch the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid, not to fight.

Therefore, he instantly came to a drop of the primordial spiritual spring liquid, and immediately grabbed it.

At this moment, a Nine Realms-level master burst out with all his combat power and instantly killed Ye Tian.

However, Ye Tian ignored the other party's attack and insisted on taking this drop of Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid.

Poof!

The opponent's top-notch origin control technique hit Ye Tian's body, but most of the attacks were absorbed by the Devouring Mountain Physique, plus the offset of the five Ten Thousand Phase Statues, this blow did not hurt Ye Tian at all.

And Ye Tian also forcibly took this drop of Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid.

"What's the matter, it didn't hurt him?"

The Nine Realms-level master was stunned.

Ye Tian actually chose to resist his attack, and he was not injured!!

How is this possible, Ye Tian's strength is obviously not as powerful as him!

Next, Ye Tian ignored the attacks of others and snatched the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid.

In an instant, all the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid was snatched away.

"Three drops of Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid, it's okay!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

And not all the Nine Realm-level controllers have snatched the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid, and there are a few Nine Realm-level controllers who have not grabbed a drop, it is not a matter of strength, it is a matter of luck.

Many of the Eternal Masters did not leave, because the Primordial Spiritual Spring Liquid was not limited to this wave, there were three waves in total.

"Little junior brother, have you snatched the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid?"

The Snow Maiden Controller asked.

She was bent on snatching the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid, so she didn't pay attention to Ye Tian, and she didn't know Ye Tian's situation.

"Robbed, three drops in total!"

Ye Tian said.

"I actually snatched three drops of the Primal Spirit Spring Liquid!! "The Snow Maiden controller was a little surprised.

It's not that she didn't come here to snatch the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid at the Nine Realms level Controller, she had come here to snatch it under the leadership of the Ancient Demon Senior Brother, but she only snatched two drops of the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid for the first time!

And Ye Tian's strength was not as strong as she was at the beginning.

"Fourth Senior Sister, how much Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid have you snatched?" Ye Tian was a little curious.

"Sixty-six drops!"

The Snow Maiden said.

"Shhh

Ye Tian gasped, this was much more than his number.

However, the Snow Maiden controller is a Ten Realms level controller, her strength is much stronger than him, and her speed is also fast, so she can naturally easily snatch the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid, and the Ten Realms level controllers will not break out into battle, it's just to see who picks it up fast!

Soon, the second wave began.

This time, Ye Tian snatched four drops of the Primal Spirit Spring Liquid.

The reason why they snatched so much was because others knew that Ye Tian was not afraid of attacking, so it was not cost-effective to compete with Ye Tian for the Primal Spirit Spring Liquid, so there were fewer competitors.

Subsequently.

The third wave began.

This time, Ye Tian was a little less lucky, and he only snatched two drops of the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid.

Three waves of primordial spiritual spring liquid snatching, Ye Tian snatched a total of nine drops of primordial spiritual spring liquid, although it is not worth mentioning compared to the primordial spiritual spring liquid snatched by the ten realm-level controllers, but it is also a big gain!

Subsequently, many of the Eternal Masters left here, after all, for a long time, there would be no eruption of the Primordial Spiritual Spring Liquid here, and there was no point in staying here.

Only a handful of Eternal Masters have made this a place of cultivation, and they have not left.
